Interpretation et validation
Analyse synthetique du bilan le plus recent : Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count abaisse;
Basophils/Leukocytes in Blood by Automated count abaisse; Lymphocytes/Leukocytes in Blood by Automated count eleve.
Les resultats ci-dessus doivent etre interpretes dans le contexte clinique du patient. Antecedents ou contexte associe :
Medication review due (situation), Viral sinusitis (disorder), Social isolation (finding), Epidermal burn of skin (disorder).
